theory.canonical_statement: ID 434 formalizes the tuning of the lemniscatic geometry to maximize the Casimir energy difference between states. The transition from geometry A to B results in a ground state energy shift that can be extracted as work. The negative pressure gradient of the Casimir effect is used as a primary driver for the Furiene Turbine blades. Geometric Tuning: The scale a of the lemniscate determines the energy density, where ECasimir \textasciitilde{}c/a. Resonance Peaks: Optimization focuses on the frequency f = f0 alpha for maximal extraction.
theory.technical_interpretation: ID 434 formalizes the tuning of the lemniscatic geometry to maximize the Casimir energy difference between states. The transition from geometry A to B results in a ground state energy shift that can be extracted as work. The negative pressure gradient of the Casimir effect is used as a primary driver for the Furiene Turbine blades. Geometric Tuning: The scale a of the lemniscate determines the energy density, where ECasimir ~c/a. Resonance Peaks: Optimization focuses on the frequency f = f0 alpha for maximal extraction.
